sentences.target: Ich gehe nach der Therapie einkaufen.

translations.de: Ich gehe nach der Therapie einkaufen.
translations.es: Voy de compras después de la terapia.
translations.fr: Je vais faire des courses après ma séance de thérapie.
translations.it: Vado a fare la spesa dopo la terapia.
translations.zh-Hans: 治疗结束后我去买东西。
translations.ru: После терапии я иду за покупками.
translations.pt: Vou fazer compras depois da terapia.
translations.vi: Tôi đi mua sắm sau buổi trị liệu.
translations.nl: Ik ga na de therapie boodschappen doen.
translations.uk: Після терапії я йду за покупками.
translations.hi: थेरेपी के बाद मैं खरीदारी करने जाता हूँ.
translations.el: Μετά τη θεραπεία πάω για ψώνια.
translations.nb: Etter terapien går jeg og handler.
translations.sv: Jag går och handlar efter terapin.
translations.ja: セラピーの後で買い物に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb 'gehe'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive complement ('einkaufen') to express purpose.
Preposition governing dative; here temporal ('after').
Definite article, feminine singular dative, agreeing with 'Therapie' after 'nach'.
Common noun, feminine, singular, dative; object of the preposition 'nach'.
Bare infinitive of a separable verb functioning as a complement to 'gehe' (gehen + Infinitiv ohne 'zu' = purpose); not separated in infinitive form.

sentences.target: Die Therapie hilft mir gegen die Panik.
sentences.reading: /diː teːʁaˈpiː hɪlft miːɐ̯ ˈɡeːɡən diː ˈpaːnɪk/

translations.de: Die Therapie hilft mir gegen die Panik.
translations.ipa: /diː teːʁaˈpiː hɪlft miːɐ̯ ˈɡeːɡən diː ˈpaːnɪk/
translations.en: The therapy helps me with my panic.
translations.es: La terapia me ayuda a controlar el pánico.
translations.fr: La thérapie m'aide à gérer la panique.
translations.it: La terapia mi aiuta a gestire il panico.
translations.ko: 치료가 공황을 관리하는 데 도움이 돼요.
translations.ru: Терапия помогает мне справляться с паникой.
translations.pt: A terapia me ajuda a lidar com o pânico.
translations.he: הטיפול עוזר לי להתמודד עם הפאניקה.
translations.tr: Terapi panikle başa çıkmama yardımcı oluyor.
translations.vi: Liệu pháp giúp tôi kiểm soát cơn hoảng loạn.
translations.ar: العلاج يساعدني على التعامل مع الذعر.
translations.nl: Therapie helpt me om met paniek om te gaan.
translations.uk: Терапія допомагає мені справлятися з панікою.
translations.hu: A terápia segít megbirkózni a pánikkal.
translations.hi: थेरेपी मुझे घबराहट से निपटने में मदद करती है.
translations.pl: Terapia pomaga mi radzić sobie z paniką.
translations.el: Η θεραπεία με βοηθά να διαχειρίζομαι τον πανικό.
translations.nb: Terapien hjelper meg å håndtere panikken.
translations.sv: Terapin hjälper mig att hantera paniken.
translations.ro: Terapia mă ajută să gestionez panica.
translations.da: Terapien hjælper mig med at håndtere panikken.
translations.ja: セラピーはパニックに対処するのに役立ちます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative, agreeing with the subject 'Therapie'.
Common noun, feminine, singular, nominative; subject of 'hilft'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a dative object ('mir') and a prepositional complement ('gegen die Panik').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; indirect object required by 'helfen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces an adversative/target context.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative, agreeing with 'Panik' after 'gegen'.
Common noun, feminine, singular, accusative; object of the preposition 'gegen'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester beginnt heute ihre Therapie.

translations.de: Meine Schwester beginnt heute ihre Therapie.
translations.en: My sister starts her therapy today.
translations.es: Mi hermana empieza hoy su terapia.
translations.fr: Ma sœur commence sa thérapie aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Mia sorella inizia oggi la sua terapia.
translations.pt: Minha irmã começa a terapia hoje.
translations.he: אחותי מתחילה היום את הטיפול שלה.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi bắt đầu trị liệu hôm nay.
translations.nl: Mijn zus begint vandaag met haar therapie.
translations.hu: A lánytestvérem ma kezdi a terápiáját.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन आज से अपनी थेरेपी शुरू कर रही है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra zaczyna dziś swoją terapię.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου ξεκινά σήμερα τη θεραπεία της.
translations.nb: Min søster starter terapien sin i dag.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya mulai terapinya hari ini.
translations.sv: Min syster börjar sin terapi i dag.
translations.ro: Sora mea își începe terapia astăzi.
translations.da: Min søster starter sin terapi i dag.
translations.ja: 今日、妹がセラピーを始めます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular nominative; modifies 'Schwester' as subject.
Common noun, feminine, singular, nominative; subject of 'beginnt'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object ('ihre Therapie') and a temporal adverb ('heute').
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates time.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Therapie' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine, singular, accusative; direct object of 'beginnt'.

sentences.target: Mit der Therapie komme ich langsam voran.
sentences.reading: /mɪt deːɐ̯ teːʁaˈpiː ˈkɔmə ɪç ˈlaŋzaːm foˈʁan/

translations.de: Mit der Therapie komme ich langsam voran.
translations.ipa: /mɪt deːɐ̯ teːʁaˈpiː ˈkɔmə ɪç ˈlaŋzaːm foˈʁan/
translations.en: With the therapy I’m making progress.
translations.es: Con la terapia voy avanzando poco a poco.
translations.fr: Je progresse peu à peu avec la thérapie.
translations.it: Con la terapia sto facendo progressi poco a poco.
translations.pt: Com a terapia estou avançando aos poucos.
translations.he: עם הטיפול אני מתקדם לאט לאט.
translations.vi: Nhờ trị liệu tôi đang tiến bộ dần dần.
translations.nl: Met de therapie ga ik langzaam vooruit.
translations.hi: थेरेपी की वजह से मैं धीरे-धीरे आगे बढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Με τη θεραπεία προχωράω σιγά σιγά.
translations.nb: Med terapien går det sakte fremover.
translations.sv: Med terapin går det sakta framåt.
translations.da: Med terapien går det langsomt fremad.
translations.ja: セラピーのおかげで少しずつ前に進んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular dative, agreeing with 'Therapie' after 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine, singular, dative; object of the preposition 'mit'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; component of the separable verb 'vorankommen' (with the particle 'voran').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject (postverbal here due to topicalized prepositional phrase).
Adverb of manner modifying the verb phrase; indicates pace.
Separable verbal particle belonging to 'vorankommen'; positioned at clause-final slot in main clause.

My sister starts her therapy today.
